  addressBookCreateAddress(input: $input, label: $label) {
    ...AddressBookFields
    label
    references {
      referenceID
      type
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}

fragment AddressBookFields on AddressBookAddress {
  city
  cityArea
  companyName
  country
  countryArea
  countryCode
  firstName
  id
  label
  lastName
  phone
  postalCode
  references {
    referenceID
    type
    __typename
  }
  streetAddress1
  streetAddress2
  isDefaultShippingAddress
  isDefaultBillingAddress
  __typename
}"}]
